Name: Jasper SMN Events
Description: General-purpose Summoner event profile for PvE. Keeps automatic Addle/Radiant Aegis support, reset/on-wipe toggles, optional dungeon cooldown holds, Rekindle support, and optional out-of-combat Sprint.

Events.Name: Addle & Radiant Aegis
Events.Description: Uses Addle and Radiant Aegis on raidwide damage while in combat.

Events.Name: Rekindle MT (<=70% HP)
Events.Description: Avoids spending Rekindle on light tank chip damage.

Conditions.Name: Target No Addle
Conditions.Description: Target does not already have Addle or equivalent magic damage down.

Conditions.Name: MT HP <= 70%
Conditions.Description: Main tank is at or below 70% HP.

Logics.Name: Addle & Radiant Aegis
Logics.Description: Uses Addle and Radiant Aegis on raidwide damage while in combat.

Logics.Name: Rekindle MT (<=70% HP)
Logics.Description: Targets the main tank once damage is meaningful.

Items.Name: Rekindle MT
Items.Description: Uses Rekindle on the main tank below 70% HP.
